flow.title: Fund Flow Mechanism
flow.step1: Guardians purchase cards to support art

gallery.title: 30 Botanical Life Journey OH Cards
gallery.subtitle: Each card represents a life stage, 6 tracks × 5 stages = 30 unique art cards

modes.title: Choose Your Mode

healer.name: Healer Mode
healer.tagline: Explore your inner world in a safe container
healer.desc: As someone experiencing psychological challenges, I want a private, safe healing space where I can receive support without exposing my privacy.
healer.step1: Select OH Card spread to explore your inner world
healer.step2: Write your insights (AES encrypted + IPFS storage)
healer.step4: View healing memories and continue growing

guardian.name: Guardian Mode
guardian.tagline: Support art and support public good
guardian.desc: As a digital art collector and public welfare supporter, I want to support the psychological healing cause by purchasing OH Card artworks while obtaining unique digital collectibles.
guardian.step2: Select favorite cards for donation collection
guardian.step4: View fund usage transparency in real-time

modes.note: Note: Guardians can only donate not claim, Healers can only claim not donate — roles are mutually exclusive

healer.content: I discovered this sanctuary at my lowest point. Drawing an OH Card every day and writing down my feelings, without having to explain to anyone, yet receiving support. This feeling of being understood without exposing privacy helped me slowly recover.

guardian.content: I collected 5 plant cards, not just for their artistic value, but because I know these funds are really helping people in need. Blockchain transparency allows me to track every fund's destination — this trust is something traditional charity cannot provide.

privacy.title: Privacy Protection

timemachine.futureStage: In {days} days, your emotions will enter a new stage
timemachine.completeFirstExploration: After completing your first exploration, your emotional evolution trajectory will be displayed here
timemachine.comingSoonDesc: We are developing intelligent emotion analysis based on on-chain data to help you understand emotional evolution trends.

modal.closeHint: Press ESC or click anywhere to close

verification.title: Apply for Mutual Aid Funds
verification.intro: Thank you for taking these twenty minutes for yourself.
verification.description: In the sanctuary's mutual aid pool, there's support waiting for you from afar. To ensure this kindness isn't exploited by cold automated programs, we need to verify you're a real person.

privacy.title: Privacy Protection Promise
privacy.desc: We use simulated ZK-Email technology. Your email address is processed locally only, never stored or transmitted to servers. We only save an irreversible hash as your anonymous pass.

animation.disconnecting: Disconnecting network to ensure data stays local...
animation.shredded: Email address has been locally shredded 🗑️

success.title: Verification Successful!
success.desc: Your anonymous pass has been generated. You can claim mutual aid funds within the next 24 hours.

error.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address
error.codeExpired: Code expired, please get a new one
error.alreadyClaimed: This email has already claimed funds

verification.devModeAlert:
[TEST MODE] Your verification code is: {code}

Please enter this code in the input field below.

claim.title: Apply for Mutual Aid Funds
claim.intro: Thank you for taking these twenty minutes for yourself.
claim.description: In the sanctuary's mutual aid pool, there's support waiting for you from afar.

requirements.title: Requirements
requirements.hint: Complete an OH Card exploration to meet the application requirements

actions.notToday: Not today, just save my exploration

error.failed: Claim failed, please check wallet connection and balance

counselor.title: Counseling Service
counselor.subtitle: One-on-one support from professional counselors
counselor.description: We are partnering with professional counseling teams to create a safe and private online consultation experience. Once launched, beneficiaries will be able to access free psychological support through the Sanctuary Protocol.

matching.title: Smart Matching
matching.desc: Match with suitable counselors based on your needs

cbt.title: CBT Cognitive Behavioral Therapy
cbt.subtitle: Structured journaling to reshape thinking patterns
cbt.description: CBT (Cognitive Behavioral Therapy) is a scientifically validated psychotherapy method. We are developing an interactive CBT journaling tool to help users identify and change negative thinking patterns.

restructure.title: Cognitive Restructuring
restructure.desc: Identify and change negative thinking patterns

guestMode.notice: You are experiencing in guest mode. Data is only saved in your local browser. Connect your wallet to permanently save your healing journey.
